# Birdhouse Labs

> AI Agent Orchestration Platform

## Description

Birdhouse is an AI agent orchestration platform where agents actively communicate and collaborate as a team. Code with multi-agent teams that can communicate, coordinate, and complete complex software development tasks together.

## Key Features

- **Real Agent Teams**: Agents work together as a team, not just in parallel. Team members actively communicate and collaborate, with each agent being a full-fledged team member you can message directly.
- **Agent-First Architecture**: Agents are provided a complete shell environment with full system access. They don't need your approval - they just get things done.
- **Visual Agent Tree**: Browse agent sessions and navigate directly to any agent. Agents are organized by team structure with highlighting to show which agents are working.
- **Saved Skills**: Save successful workflows as reusable skills that can be triggered with natural language. Turn favorite phrases into curated prompts.
- **Direct Agent Messaging**: Each agent is a full-fledged team member that developers can message directly for steering and collaboration.

## Use Cases

- Orchestrate teams of AI agents for complex software development tasks
- Delegate work across multiple agents while maintaining oversight
- Build software with agents that have full system access and can act autonomously
- Save and reuse successful multi-agent workflows as skills
- Navigate agent trees to check progress and provide guidance

## Product Details

- **Status**: Limited beta starting March 2026
- **Join Waitlist**: https://birdhouselabs.ai (email signup form on site)
- **Twitter**: @BirdhouseLabs
